title: gahnia marquisensis
intro: Gahnia marquisensis, also known as the Marquis Islands gahnia, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Gahnia marquisensis include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to support immune function. Gahnia marquisensis can be prepared in various ways, including as a tea, infusion, or topical application, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
